title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeated NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament is significant for local sports fans and the university community.
